<Tabs>
<TabItem label="JSON (and super languages)" icon="seti:json">
:::note
This rule has been implemented but not released yet. It will be available in the next release.
:::
:::caution
This rule is part of the [nursery](/linter/#nursery) group. This means that it is experimental and the behavior can change at any time.
:::
## Summary
- Diagnostic Category: [`lint/nursery/noRestrictedDependencies`](/reference/diagnostics#diagnostic-category)
- This rule doesn't have a fix.
- The default severity of this rule is [**information**](/reference/diagnostics#information).
- Sources: 
  - Same as [`e18e/ban-dependencies`](https://github.com/e18e/eslint-plugin)

## How to configure
```json title="biome.json"
{
	"linter": {
		"rules": {
			"nursery": {
				"noRestrictedDependencies": "error"
			}
		}
	}
}

```
## Description
Disallow dependencies that are known to have better alternatives.

This rule checks `dependencies` and `devDependencies` in `package.json`
against [e18e](https://e18e.dev/)'s replacement data and suggests modern, native, or more
maintainable alternatives.

## Examples

### Invalid

```json title='package.json'
{
  "dependencies": {
    "globby": "x.x.x"
  }
}
```

<pre class="language-text"><code class="language-text"><a href="file:///package.json">/package.json</a>:3:5 <a href="https://biomejs.dev/linter/rules/no-restricted-dependencies">lint/nursery/noRestrictedDependencies</a> ━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━<br /><br />  <strong><span style="color: lightgreen;">ℹ</span></strong> <span style="color: lightgreen;">Use of the restricted dependency </span><span style="color: lightgreen;"><strong>globby</strong></span><span style="color: lightgreen;"> detected.</span><br />  <br />    <strong>1 │ </strong>&#123;<br />    <strong>2 │ </strong>  &quot;dependencies&quot;: &#123;<br />  <strong><span style="color: Tomato;">&gt;</span></strong> <strong>3 │ </strong>    &quot;globby&quot;: &quot;x.x.x&quot;<br />   <strong>   │ </strong>    <strong><span style="color: Tomato;">^</span></strong><strong><span style="color: Tomato;">^</span></strong><strong><span style="color: Tomato;">^</span></strong><strong><span style="color: Tomato;">^</span></strong><strong><span style="color: Tomato;">^</span></strong><strong><span style="color: Tomato;">^</span></strong><strong><span style="color: Tomato;">^</span></strong><strong><span style="color: Tomato;">^</span></strong><br />    <strong>4 │ </strong>  &#125;<br />    <strong>5 │ </strong>&#125;<br />  <br />  <strong><span style="color: lightgreen;">ℹ</span></strong> <span style="color: lightgreen;">The dependency might be old, not actively maintained, or there's a native alternative.</span><br />  <br />  <strong><span style="color: lightgreen;">ℹ</span></strong> <span style="color: lightgreen;">The following replacement is suggested:<br /></span>    <span style="color: lightgreen;">- Replace with the alternative: </span><span style="color: lightgreen;"><strong>tinyglobby</strong></span><span style="color: lightgreen;">.</span><br />  <br />  <strong><span style="color: lightgreen;">ℹ</span></strong> <span style="color: lightgreen;">Read more: </span><span style="color: lightgreen;"><a href="https://e18e.dev/docs/replacements/globby">https://e18e.dev/docs/replacements/globby</a></span><br />  <br />  <strong><span style="color: lightgreen;">ℹ</span></strong> <span style="color: lightgreen;">This rule belongs to the nursery group, which means it is not yet stable and may change in the future. Visit </span><span style="color: lightgreen;"><a href="https://biomejs.dev/linter/#nursery">https://biomejs.dev/linter/#nursery</a></span><span style="color: lightgreen;"> for more information.</span><br />  <br /></code></pre>

### Valid

```json title='package.json'
{
  "dependencies": {
    "tinyglobby": "x.x.x"
  }
}
```

See <https://e18e.dev/docs/replacements/> for the full list of replacements.

## Summary
- Diagnostic Category: [`lint/nursery/noRestrictedDependencies`](/reference/diagnostics#diagnostic-category)
- This rule doesn't have a fix.
- The default severity of this rule is [**information**](/reference/diagnostics#information).
- Sources: 
  - Same as [`e18e/ban-dependencies`](https://github.com/e18e/eslint-plugin)

## How to configure
```json title="biome.json"
{
	"linter": {
		"rules": {
			"nursery": {
				"noRestrictedDependencies": "error"
			}
		}
	}
}

```
## Description
Disallow dependencies that are known to have better alternatives.

This rule checks static imports, dynamic `import()`, and `require()` calls
and suggests modern, native, or more maintainable alternatives based on
[e18e](https://e18e.dev/)'s replacement data.

## Examples

### Invalid

```js
import glob from "globby";
```

<pre class="language-text"><code class="language-text">code-block.js:1:18 <a href="https://biomejs.dev/linter/rules/no-restricted-dependencies">lint/nursery/noRestrictedDependencies</a> ━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━<br /><br />  <strong><span style="color: lightgreen;">ℹ</span></strong> <span style="color: lightgreen;">Use of the restricted dependency </span><span style="color: lightgreen;"><strong>globby</strong></span><span style="color: lightgreen;"> detected.</span><br />  <br />  <strong><span style="color: Tomato;">&gt;</span></strong> <strong>1 │ </strong>import glob from &quot;globby&quot;;<br />   <strong>   │ </strong>                 <strong><span style="color: Tomato;">^</span></strong><strong><span style="color: Tomato;">^</span></strong><strong><span style="color: Tomato;">^</span></strong><strong><span style="color: Tomato;">^</span></strong><strong><span style="color: Tomato;">^</span></strong><strong><span style="color: Tomato;">^</span></strong><strong><span style="color: Tomato;">^</span></strong><strong><span style="color: Tomato;">^</span></strong><br />    <strong>2 │ </strong><br />  <br />  <strong><span style="color: lightgreen;">ℹ</span></strong> <span style="color: lightgreen;">The dependency might be old, not actively maintained, or there's a native alternative.</span><br />  <br />  <strong><span style="color: lightgreen;">ℹ</span></strong> <span style="color: lightgreen;">The following replacement is suggested:<br /></span>    <span style="color: lightgreen;">- Replace with the alternative: </span><span style="color: lightgreen;"><strong>tinyglobby</strong></span><span style="color: lightgreen;">.</span><br />  <br />  <strong><span style="color: lightgreen;">ℹ</span></strong> <span style="color: lightgreen;">Read more: </span><span style="color: lightgreen;"><a href="https://e18e.dev/docs/replacements/globby">https://e18e.dev/docs/replacements/globby</a></span><br />  <br />  <strong><span style="color: lightgreen;">ℹ</span></strong> <span style="color: lightgreen;">This rule belongs to the nursery group, which means it is not yet stable and may change in the future. Visit </span><span style="color: lightgreen;"><a href="https://biomejs.dev/linter/#nursery">https://biomejs.dev/linter/#nursery</a></span><span style="color: lightgreen;"> for more information.</span><br />  <br /></code></pre>

```js
const glob = require("globby");
```

Visit </span><span style="color: lightgreen;"><a href="https://biomejs.dev/linter/#nursery">https://biomejs.dev/linter/#nursery</a></span><span style="color: lightgreen;"> for more information.</span><br />  <br /></code></pre>

### Valid

```js
import glob from "tinyglobby";
```

```js
const glob = require("tinyglobby");
```

```js
const glob = await import("tinyglobby");
```

See <https://e18e.dev/docs/replacements/> for the full list of replacements.
